cases.prompt: Add full-text search to my Post model with Meilisearch
cases.expect: uses the Searchable trait, defines toSearchableArray, configures SCOUT_DRIVER=meilisearch and filterable attributes

cases.prompt: Why is my Scout search ignoring the where('status','published') filter?
cases.expect: explains Meilisearch filterableAttributes must be configured then scout:sync-index-settings run
